title: nf-core/geoadapt pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

vcf_path.errorMessage: VCF file must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.vcf' or '.vcf.gz'

population.errorMessage: Population code must be provided and cannot contain spaces

latitude.errorMessage: Latitude must be a number between -90 and 90

longitude.errorMessage: Longitude must be a number between -180 and 180
